projectDescription: A zero-dependency TypeScript/JavaScript library for parsing and stringifying INI files while preserving comments and supporting global sections.
keyFeatures: Parse INI text strings into structured JavaScript objects
Stringify parsed objects back to INI-formatted text
Preserves comments (`;` prefixed lines) and associates them with key-value pairs
Global section support for key-value pairs outside named sections
Empty value support via configurable parser options
Zero dependencies — works in Node.js and browsers
Utility functions for programmatic INI editing (addSection, addKeyValue, updateKeyValue, addComment)
publicApiSurface: addKeyValue(obj: IniObject, section: string, key: string, value: string, options: AddSectionOptions): Block
updateKeyValue(obj: IniObject, section: string, key: string, value: string): Block
addComment(obj: IniObject, section: string, comment: string, options: AddCommentOptions): Block
getSection(sections: Section[], sectionName: string): Section | undefined
